Figure-1i

MJY

2024-09-03

OUTLINES:

Generates Hi-C interaction heatmaps for control and treated samples, as well as a difference plot.

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(GENOVA))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ggplot2))
## Warning: 程序包'ggplot2'是用R版本4.5.2 来建造的
setwd("F:/share/data/hic_matrix/")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'F:/share/data/hic_matrix/')
# Load the contact data for the control and the treated sample
con_6w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './con_6w/iced/40000/con_6w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= './con_6w/raw/40000/con_6w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_6w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'con_6w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 100140390 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
ccl4_6w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './ccl4_6w/iced/40000/ccl4_6w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = './ccl4_6w/raw/40000/ccl4_6w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_6w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'ccl4_6w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 99595903 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
# Generate a pyramid plot for the control and the treated sample
con_6w_pyramid <- pyramid(con_6w,
                          chr = "chr1", 
                          start = 10e6, 
                          end = 16e6,
                          crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                          colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Con_6w")
con_6w_pyramid

ccl4_6w_pyramid <- pyramid(ccl4_6w,
                           chr = "chr1", 
                           start = 10e6, 
                           end = 16e6,
                           crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                           colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Fib_6w")
ccl4_6w_pyramid

# Generate a pyramid difference plot (ccl4_6w - con_6w)
difference_6w_pyramid <- pyramid_difference(ccl4_6w,
                                            con_6w,
                                            chr = "chr1", 
                                            start = 10e6, 
                                            end = 16e6,
                                            crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                                            colour = c(-80, 20)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Dif_6w")
difference_6w_pyramid

ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/con_6w.png", plot = con_6w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/ccl4_6w.png", plot = ccl4_6w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/Dif_6w.png", plot = difference_6w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
# Load the contact data for the control and the treated sample
con_10w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './con_10w/iced/40000/con_10w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= './con_10w/raw/40000/con_10w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_10w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'con_10w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 61586751 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
ccl4_10w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './ccl4_10w/iced/40000/ccl4_10w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = './ccl4_10w/raw/40000/ccl4_10w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_10w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'ccl4_10w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 99251498 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
# Generate a pyramid plot for the control and the treated sample
con_10w_pyramid <- pyramid(con_10w,
                          chr = "chr1", 
                          start = 10e6, 
                          end = 16e6,
                          crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                          colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Con_10w")
con_10w_pyramid

ccl4_10w_pyramid <- pyramid(ccl4_10w,
                           chr = "chr1", 
                           start = 10e6, 
                           end = 16e6,
                           crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                           colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Fib_10w")
ccl4_10w_pyramid

# Generate a pyramid difference plot (ccl4_6w - con_6w)
difference_10w_pyramid <- pyramid_difference(ccl4_10w,
                                            con_10w,
                                            chr = "chr1", 
                                            start = 10e6, 
                                            end = 16e6,
                                            crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                                            colour = c(-80, 20)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Dif_10w")
difference_10w_pyramid

ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/con_10w.png", plot = con_10w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/ccl4_10w.png", plot = ccl4_10w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/Dif_10w.png", plot = difference_10w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
# Load the contact data for the control and the treated sample
con_18w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './con_18w/iced/40000/con_18w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= './con_18w/raw/40000/con_18w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_18w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'con_18w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 125514631 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
ccl4_18w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = './ccl4_18w/iced/40000/ccl4_18w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = './ccl4_18w/raw/40000/ccl4_18w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_18w
## A GENOVA contacts object named 'ccl4_18w_40000_iced.matrix' at a resolution of 40 kb.
## Contains the following slots:
## - MAT    :   Triplet format matrix containing 172991322 informative bins.
## - IDX    :   68149 genomic indices in BED format.
## - CHRS   :   A vector of 21 chromosome names.
## - CENTROMERES:   Locations of 21 centromeres.
## This object is assigned the colour 'black'
## 0 bins are masked.
## Some chromosomes have been removed.
## The data have not been Z-score normalised.
## The original data were loaded in as balanced data.
# Generate a pyramid plot for the control and the treated sample
con_18w_pyramid <- pyramid(con_18w,
                          chr = "chr1", 
                          start = 10e6, 
                          end = 16e6,
                          crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                          colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Con_18w")
con_18w_pyramid

ccl4_18w_pyramid <- pyramid(ccl4_18w,
                           chr = "chr1", 
                           start = 10e6, 
                           end = 16e6,
                           crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                           colour = c(0, 500)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Fib_18w")
ccl4_18w_pyramid

# Generate a pyramid difference plot (ccl4_6w - con_6w)
difference_18w_pyramid <- pyramid_difference(ccl4_18w,
                                            con_18w,
                                            chr = "chr1", 
                                            start = 10e6, 
                                            end = 16e6,
                                            crop_y = c(0, 1.5e6),
                                            colour = c(-80, 20)) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Dif_18w")
difference_18w_pyramid

ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/con_18w.png", plot = con_18w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/ccl4_18w.png", plot = ccl4_18w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
ggsave("F:/share/results/figure1e/Dif_18w.png", plot = difference_18w_pyramid, width = 10, height = 2, dpi = 300)
